text: Ka Jakob yɛl ye, “M sɔsidif nɛ, yɛlimi fʋ yʋ'ʋr!” Ka o lɛbis ye, “Ka bɔ ka fʋ bu'osidi m yʋ'ʋrɛ?” Ka niŋ o zug bareka anina.
translated: Then Jacob said, “I will give you a gift, you will be my son!” Then he said, “And what will you give me in return for my son?” Then he gave him a gift.
